title: Bikes for Unbound Gravel’s Longest Race — How Racers Prep for the 350-Mile XL
content:
Even though Unbound XL is one of the shorter events on the ultra-racing calendar, it is a mammoth effort to race.

Read the full article at Bikes for Unbound Gravel’s Longest Race — How Racers Prep for the 350-Mile XL on Velo.
author: Logan Jones-Wilkins
